cases.description: Systematic QA request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: let's QA the whole app before the release
expectations: Discovers or creates the phase list
Presents the full phase list before starting
Writes a living QA report document that updates after each phase

cases.description: User with existing QA doc triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I have docs/qa/release-qa.md — help me execute it step by step
expectations: Runs one phase at a time, waiting for approval between phases

cases.description: Pre-release regression sweep triggers the skill
cases.prompt: run a regression pass on the new release
expectations: Distinguishes AGENT-automatable checks (CLI, JSON, config) from HUMAN-only checks (IDE, visual, interactive)
Reads source code before diagnosing any check as PASS/FAIL
Never jumps phases without explicit human approval

cases.description: Running a single unit test does NOT trigger guided-qa-testing
expectations: Does NOT build a phase list or write a QA report

cases.description: Codi installation audit routes to a different skill
cases.prompt: audit the full Codi installation end-to-end
expectations: Does NOT activate guided-qa-testing skill (that's for consumer projects)
Does NOT produce a living QA report for Codi itself
